name: instrument-control-v1-template
template_usage: Replace /instrument with the instrument's existing native namespace, declare its real capabilities, choose a state synchronization mode, then regenerate the contract_id golden sidecar.

hashes.algorithm: SHA-256 truncated to 128 bits, lowercase hex (32 characters)
hashes.contract_id: Canonical UTF-8 JSON with sorted keys, no whitespace and no NaN/Infinity, excluding top-level contract_id, golden_hash and expected_contract_id fields. The expected value lives in a golden sidecar.

instrument.description: Replace with the instrument's stable identity and musical role.
instrument.native_namespace_rule: The existing native namespace is authoritative. Do not flatten capabilities into a mandatory common voice protocol.

stream_identity.stream_id: Random 64-bit lowercase hexadecimal value generated once per instrument process start.
stream_identity.scope: state_seq and monotonic client state are scoped to stream_id.
stream_identity.restart_rule: A new stream_id invalidates cached state and requires a fresh state synchronization.

counters.state_seq: Unsigned monotonic OSC int64 (h), incremented for every state change or state snapshot emitted by the instrument.

handshake.rebroadcast: At process start, approximately every hello_rebroadcast_s, and whenever contract or producer metadata changes.

capabilities.name: voice_gain
capabilities.smoothing: Linear ramp inside the instrument; clients may request steps no faster than the declared lag can settle.

capabilities.name: voice_phase

arguments.name: phase_degrees
arguments.polarity: Increasing values advance phase in degrees; 360 wraps to 0.

capabilities.smoothing: Shortest-path circular interpolation inside the instrument.

state_sync.response: One atomic bundle beginning with /instrument/state/begin(stream_id, state_seq, contract_id), followed by current readable capability values at their native addresses, and ending with /instrument/state/end(stream_id, state_seq).
state_sync.connect_rule: After a matching /hello, a client MUST complete a state dump before presenting or modifying instrument state.

receiver_rules.client_gating: A client MUST NOT send capability writes until /hello contract_id exactly matches the locally accepted contract_id and state synchronization completes.
receiver_rules.stale_contract: On a missing or mismatched contract_id, stop writes, discard state messages, mark the instrument incompatible and request /hello again.
receiver_rules.instrument_gating: When a transport adapter can identify negotiated clients, the instrument MUST ignore writes from clients that did not complete a matching handshake.
receiver_rules.monotonic_discard: Within one stream_id, discard state updates with state_seq less than or equal to the last applied state_seq, except members of the same atomic state dump.
receiver_rules.stream_change: A new stream_id clears cached state and requires a fresh dump or periodic-broadcast synchronization.

voice_model_alias.status: Optional adapter metadata; it is not the instrument's native contract and may be omitted entirely.
